Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Remove any reference to the non‑existent namespace Aspose.Words.Drawing.Enums; the required enums are directly under Aspose.Words.Drawing.
Keep the using directive: using Aspose.Words.Drawing; which provides WrapType, RelativeHorizontalPosition, RelativeVerticalPosition, HorizontalAlignment, and VerticalAlignment.
All image file paths must be valid relative to the executable's working directory or use absolute paths.
